name: io.github.mason-levyy/mfp-mcp
title: MyFitnessPal
description: MCP server for MyFitnessPal: log, search, and analyze your food diary.

environmentVariables.name: MFP_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: MyFitnessPal session cookie (optional; 'mfp-mcp auth' is the guided alternative)

environmentVariables.name: MFP_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: MyFitnessPal username; only needed if MFP's profile lookup fails for your account
